title: JSON Schema 模板：人物头像（Agent 调用推荐）
description: Prompt-as-Code 结构化模板，适合写真头像、动漫头像、IP 形象。核心防坑：五官拆解而非模糊描述。来源方法论：awesome-gpt-image-2。

subject.description: {{人物描述，如 young East Asian woman / male game character / Q-style chibi}}
subject.facial_features: {{拆解五官，如 桃花眼/double eyelids, high bridge nose, defined jawline — 不要只写 'beautiful'}}
subject.expression: {{表情，如 confident slight smile / serious focused / warm and approachable}}
subject.hair: {{发型 + 颜色，如 shoulder-length black hair with subtle wave / dyed pink twin tails}}

clothing.style: {{服装，如 casual streetwear / traditional hanfu / professional attire}}
clothing.material: {{材质，如 denim/silk/linen/leather — 写材质比写风格稳}}

content.background: {{背景，如 pure white / soft bokeh city lights / gradient studio}}

photography.aperture: {{光圈，如 f/1.4 for shallow depth of field}}
photography.lighting: {{光线，如 soft butterfly lighting / dramatic Rembrandt / natural window}}

title: 写真头像 — 电影感人物肖像
description: 高质量商业写真风格肖像，用相机参数替代模糊风格描述。
content: Cinematic portrait photography of a young East Asian woman. Facial features: defined double eyelids with natural almond-shaped eyes, high bridge nose, subtle cheekbones, clean oval face structure. Expression: calm, slightly introspective, direct gaze at camera with soft confidence. Hair: glossy dark brown shoulder-length hair with natural wave, a few loose strands across forehead. Clothing: minimalist off-white ribbed knit turtleneck, visible texture. Camera: Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm portrait lens, f/1.4 (background completely dissolved into creamy bokeh). Lighting: large softbox butterfly lighting from above-front, creating even illumination with slight shadow under nose, warm 5500K color temperature. Background: very soft gradient warm gray with circular bokeh from distant light sources. Skin texture: natural, visible pores, subtle warmth, not over-retouched. Quality: 4K editorial photography standard.

title: 动漫头像 — 国风古风美人
description: 古风动漫头像，工笔风格，精致细腻。Gemini 后端（动漫首选）。
content: Anime style portrait of a young Chinese classical beauty. Art style: detailed anime with fine gongbi-inspired line quality (工笔重彩 influence), beautiful detailed eyes with long lashes, dramatic but delicate character design. Facial features: phoenix eyes (丹凤眼) with red inner corner accent, porcelain fair skin, delicate nose, pearl-red lips with subtle gloss. Hair: elaborate traditional hair updo with decorative phoenix hairpin (凤钗), wispy strands framing face, deep black with subtle blue sheen. Clothing visible at shoulders: silk hanfu with embroidered floral patterns in crimson and gold. Background: soft misty painting effect with distant red plum blossoms (梅花). Color palette: classic Chinese red, gold, cream white, deep ink black. 1:1 square, high detail anime illustration quality.

title: 科技风头像 — 数字人/AI Avatar
description: AI/科技感人物头像，适合 AI 产品、数字人、科技圈个人品牌。
content: Ultra-realistic digital human portrait with AI aesthetic. Subject: androgynous young adult with striking clean features, sharp defined jawline, luminous skin with subtle subsurface scattering. Eyes: unusually vivid teal-blue iris with slight geometric highlights suggesting digital augmentation, intense but calm gaze. Hair: clean minimal cut, silver-white with cool blue tones. Lighting: dramatic studio setup — one side strong cool blue-white key light (suggesting screen glow), opposite side subtle warm amber fill. Background: pure black with very subtle circular data visualization patterns in deep teal (almost invisible). Skin: photorealistic with visible skin detail but uncannily perfect, suggesting human-AI boundary. Style: between high-end cosmetics photography and sci-fi concept art. Camera: 85mm, f/2.0, extreme detail. 1:1.

title: Q 版头像 — 3D 卡通风 IP 形象
description: 3D 渲染 Q 版 IP 头像，适合个人品牌/公众号/虚拟助手。
content: 3D rendered chibi-style character portrait for personal IP/brand avatar. Character: adorable chibi proportions (oversized head 2:1 ratio to body), smooth 3D rendered surfaces with subtle subsurface scattering on skin. Facial features: large expressive sparkly eyes with multiple reflection highlights, small cute button nose, soft rounded cheeks with subtle rose blush. Hair: {{发色和发型，如 warm brown wavy bob / silver twin tails / black fluffy curls}}. Outfit: {{服装，如 cozy oversized hoodie in pastel blue / academic style blazer and tie}}. Background: clean white studio with soft cast shadow below. Lighting: three-point studio lighting, soft and flattering, main light slightly above. Style: Pixar/Disney quality character render, commercial mascot standard. 1:1.

title: 油画风肖像 — 文艺复兴古典美
description: 古典油画风格肖像，强烈明暗对比，Rembrandt 光效，Gemini 后端。
content: Classical oil painting style portrait inspired by Dutch Golden Age masters. Subject: {{人物描述}}. Art technique: visible impasto brushstrokes with palette knife texture, rich color depth through multiple glazed layers, dramatic chiaroscuro (Rembrandt lighting — single light source from upper side creating triangle highlight on shadowed cheek). Skin: warm luminous flesh tones with subsurface scattering effect through oil medium, soft but precise edge definition. Background: deep dark earth tones (burnt umber, raw sienna), background details dissolving into warm shadows. Canvas texture: weave pattern visible throughout, adds authenticity. Color palette: Old Masters palette — cadmium red, raw umber, titanium white, ivory black, yellow ochre. Overall feel: timeless classical portrait worthy of museum display. 3:4 vertical.
